mapper.select: SELECT si.item_name, sc.category_name, COUNT(*) AS subscribe_count, ROUND(AVG(a.price)) AS avg_price FROM add_subscription a JOIN subscription_item si ON a.item_id = si.item_id JOIN subscription_category sc ON si.category_id = sc.category_id WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY si.item_id, si.item_name, sc.category_name ORDER BY subscribe_count DESC, avg_price ASC LIMIT #{limit}
